arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Athletic Bilbao in the return of LaLiga to the Santiago Bernabeu. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Fran Garcia, Ceballos, Camavinga, Bellingham, Vinicius, Brahim, Endrick.

arts.ttl: Swansea investor Luka Modric repeatedly made thoughts clear on Wales legend Gareth Bale
arts.sum: Luka Modric and Gareth Bale have been close friends and team-mates for well over a decade, with the Croatian legend always willing to defend his former Real Madrid colleague

arts.ttl: Luka Modric showed true colours with stance on Wales hero Gareth Bale
arts.sum: Welsh footballing legend Gareth Bale never had it easy at Real Madrid, but one man who always had his back was Luka Modric, who teamed with him in both Spain and England

arts.ttl: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti's future 'becomes clear' as national team 'insist' on his arrival
arts.sum: Brazil are reportedly working on appointing Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti as their new head coach, with the Italian expected to leave Bernabeu this summer.

arts.ttl: Former Real Madrid and Liverpool star reveals health scare and thanks doctors for 'saving his life'
arts.sum: A former Liverpool and Real Madrid star has opened up on a health battle that left him 'scared to death'. The former player suffered a pulmonary embolism.

arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm Robert Lewandowski injury ahead of Real Madrid and Inter Milan fixtures
arts.sum: Barcelona may have won 4-3 against Celta Vigo on Saturday, but one of the big takeaways is Robert Lewandowski’s injury problem that has now been confirmed by the Catalan giants. In the 78th minute of proceedings at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys, Lewandowski pulled out whilst holding his hamstring. arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti at risk of Real Madrid sack before Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti faces being sacked as Real Madrid manager immediately if he cannot turn things around.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams news: Athletic Club star drops HUGE Arsenal transfer hint
arts.sum: The Spanish side reached the Europa League semi-finals on Thursday night and following his team’s win over Rangers, Williams suggested that he dreams of playing in the Champions League with Athletic Club next year. Nico Williams has seemingly hinted that he will reject Arsenal and remain at Athletic Club until at least next summer.
